title: Busbar Price in Pakistan 2026 — Copper Busbar, Aluminium Busbar & Busbar Trunking System Complete Buyer Guide
meta_description: Busbar price in Pakistan 2026: copper busbar Rs 180–1,800/metre, aluminium busbar Rs 90–950/metre, busbar trunking Rs 4,500–45,000/metre. Complete sizing guide, ampacity tables, de-rating for Pakistani ambient temperature, and panel builder checklist.
summary_html: Busbar price in Pakistan 2026: copper busbar Rs 180–1,800/metre, aluminium busbar Rs 90–950/metre, busbar trunking Rs 4,500–45,000/metre. Includes ampacity de-rating table for Pakistan ambient 35–55°C, kVA-to-busbar-size reference, copper vs aluminium comparison, busbar trunking guide, and Pakistan panel builder installation checklist with torque specs.
